name: Logi Analytics (insightsoftware) Embedded BI API
what_it_does: Logi Analytics (now Logi Symphony by insightsoftware) REST API for developer-centric embedded analytics and business intelligence platform integration. Enables AI agents to manage embedded dashboard and visualization creation for application analytics development, handle self-service analytics and ad-hoc reporting for end-user analytics automation, access data pipeline and preparation integration for analytics data governance, retrieve multi-tenant analytics provisioning for SaaS application embedding, manage report scheduling and automated distribution for analytics delivery, handle white-label analytics customization for branded embedded experience, access API-driven analytics configuration for programmatic dashboard management, retrieve row-level security and data access control for enterprise governance, manage analytics template and theme management for consistent analytics experience, and integrate Logi Analytics with ERP, CRM, and enterprise data platforms.
use_cases: Embedding analytics in SaaS applications from developer agents
Provisioning multi-tenant analytics from platform agents
Automating report delivery from analytics distribution agents
Creating self-service analytics from data democratization agents
not_for: Stand-alone BI tools without embedded application context
Organizations without developer resources for analytics integration
Very small teams without enterprise embedded analytics requirements
best_when: A SaaS vendor or ISV embedding analytics in their product using Logi Analytics (Logi Symphony) wants AI agents to automate dashboard provisioning, multi-tenant management, report delivery, and embedded analytics workflow.
avoid_when: ACQUISITION INTEGRATION RISK: insightsoftware has made 30+ acquisitions including Logi Analytics (2021) — post-acquisition API integration and product roadmap may have shifted; verify current Logi Symphony API stability and insightsoftware's long-term product direction. Multi-tenant isolation — automated tenant provisioning must implement strict data isolation; tenant configuration errors in automated provisioning create cross-tenant data leakage risk. insightsoftware portfolio complexity — insightsoftware owns 30+ analytics and finance products; ensure Logi Symphony-specific API documentation applies to your target product, not another insightsoftware portfolio product.

auth.notes: Logi Analytics uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Documentation at docs.logisymphony.com. McLean, Virginia HQ (insightsoftware). insightsoftware acquired Logi Analytics (2021). insightsoftware is private (TA Associates, Francisco Partners). Logi Analytics founded 2000. 2,500+ ISV and enterprise customers. Developer-centric embedded analytics. Competes with Sisense, Yellowfin, and GoodData for embedded analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-application or OEM subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual OEM subscription; per-application embedding license
pricing.notes: McLean, VA. insightsoftware (TA Associates/Francisco Partners). Logi Analytics founded 2000. 2,500+ ISV/enterprise customers. Developer embedded analytics. Competes with Sisense and Yellowfin for embedded BI.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: INSIGHTSOFTWARE ACQUISITION INTEGRATION: insightsoftware has acquired 30+ companies including Logi Analytics (2021); post-acquisition API integration may have introduced breaking changes or product direction shifts; verify current API stability

Multi-tenant data isolation — automated ISV tenant provisioning must implement strict row-level security; tenant isolation misconfiguration creates cross-tenant data leakage in shared analytics infrastructure

Logi Symphony vs Logi Report — insightsoftware rebranded Logi Analytics products; verify whether your target product is Logi Symphony (embedded analytics) vs Logi Report (operational reporting); APIs differ
No webhooks — analytics event notification requires polling; no native push for report completion, dashboard update, or user action events
OEM licensing complexity — Logi Analytics OEM embedding licenses have specific application scope and user count terms; automated analytics provisioning must respect OEM license boundaries
Documentation freshness — rapid post-acquisition product evolution may result in outdated API documentation; verify current API behavior against documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Embedded analytics. SOC2, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Multi-tenant analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Embedded BI. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Multi-tenant analytics and business data.
